title: Fire shield connector and plate
abstract: The present invention relates to a building construction using a fire protection shield connector within a wall cavity formed by fire protection boards connected to metal framing members together using the fire shield connector as a shield between the fire protection boards and the metal framing members with the fire shield connector ends securing adjacent metal framing members together by interlocking the fire shield connector ends to adjacent fire shield connectors ends and where the fire shield connector end has an extension cover securing the hole opening in the metal framing member and securing the opposing connector end by overlapping the adjacent fire protection shield connector forming a tight fit within the wall cavity.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A structural framing fire protection system comprising a fire protection shield connector within a wall cavity connecting adjacent metal framing supports together at between aperture opening of the support members by: a wall cavity having a first structural member and a second structural member substantially identical to said first structural member, each said structural members having a web with a first flange and a second flange attached to said web, each said structural member having an aperture in said web defined by a perimeter with having perimeter notches indented into the side walls of said perimeter in said web of said first structural member and said second structural member fire protection boards connecting the outside planes of said flanges of said first structural member and said second structural member leaving a wall cavity between said first structural member and said second structural member; with a fire protection shield connector having an multi-plane profile spanning between said first structural member and a said second structural member having a web attached to a longitudinal first side wall and a longitudinal second side wall attached to said web opposite said longitudinal first side wall having a first end and a second end and where said first side wall has an attached first lip extending away from said web and a second lip opposite said first lip attached to a longitudinal third side wall and said second lip has an attached fourth said wall and where said first lip and said second lip have indentations at the free edges of said first lip and said second lip to abut said flanges of said first structural member and said second structural member have cutouts in said first lip and said second lip of said fire protection shield connector for said lips from said structural members to fit into said cutouts; having said first end of said connector having an extension arm of said web extending through said aperture having said notches indented in said perimeter of said first structural member with said extension arm bent against said bottom edge of said web of first structural member and said second end having a receiver element in said web at an adjacent second connector being similar to said first connector having said extension arm for said second end having a hook tongue with said tongue end 

 extending into said receiver element overlapping over or under said adjacent connector. 2. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein said fire protection shield connector has said first end and said second end for said third wall and said fourth wall to overlap said first flange and said second flange of said first and second structural members. 3. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 2 wherein said fire protection shield connector has said first end and said second end for said third wall and said fourth wall being flush with said flanges of said first and second structural members. 4. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein said fire protection shield connector has an extension cover having a web with a first wall and a second side wall attached to said web with a first lip and a second lip for said web and said first wall and said second wall will fit over said web of said fire protection shield connector and between said first flange and said second flange of said first structural member with said extension cover having a cover plate extending from said web of said extension cover that has a wider larger profile than said aperture in said first structural member for said cover plate enclosed said aperture and for fastener to be attached to said first structural member. 5. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein said fire protection shield connector has said hook tongue extending from the web of said fire protection shield connector as for said first end of said web extends through said aperture for said hook tongue having the tongue end to engage the back side of an individual extension cover to close said aperture from penetrations in said web of said first structural member. 6. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein said fire protection shield connector has flange notches extending from the distal ends of 

 said flanges engaging the said aperture at said first end of said first structural member and or said second end of said second structural member. 7. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein said first end of said fire protection shield connector has said first end and said second end having lip flange notches to engage said first structural member and or said second end of said second structural member. 8. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein the fire protection shield connector has an extension cover being a bracket with said extension cover extending perpendicular to said web of said bracket with said bracket having a first side wall and a second side wall extending from the free edges of said web with said web and said side walls overlaps said extension arms extending from said first end at said first structural member. 9. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 8 wherein the fire protection shield connector has said bracket with bulges in said first side wall and said second side wall at the intersection of said web and said side walls for said extension arms having said bulges to overlap said extension arms. 10. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 1 wherein said second end of said fire protection shield connector having said web or said extension arm extend through said aperture of said second structural member with said web and said flange of said fire protection shield connector to engage said aperture of said second structural member having a notch for said web of said fire protection shield connector having a wide width with said first wall and said second wall having wide have flange notches for said flange notches to engage the bottom edge of said aperture notch and to extend through said aperture in said second structural member for said second end of said fire protection shield with said first and second side walls with said web having a hook tongue projection with a tongue notch for said second end to engage a receive hole element and said end having an extension cover engaging said flange notches enclosing said aperture at said second structural member. 11. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 10 wherein the perimeter of said fire protection shield connector has a fire protection composite material at said first structural member and said second structural member connecting said lips, said first wall and said second wall and said web or web plate when connecting said structural members to said fire protection shield connector. 12. The structural framing fire protection system according to claim 11 wherein the fire protection shield connector within a wall cavity connects said first end of said fire protection shield connector to said aperture in said first structural member and said second end of said fire protection shield connector to the aperture said second structural member by having said first end of said fire protection shield connector having an extension arm extending through said aperture having perimeter notches at said first structural member having notches with said undulating side edges of said web and the side edges of said extension being said notches in said aperture with said extension are having a tongue end for said second end having an extension cover extending from said web for said tongue end to extend through said slot hole in said web of an adjacent fire shield member. 13. The structural framing member according to claim 9 wherein said extension cover having a similar profile of said fire protection shield connector having a web with flanges and lips to form a bracket where said bracket has a slot hole for said tongue end to fit into. 14. The structural framing member according to claim 13 wherein said extension cover having said lips has a cutout at said lips of said metal framing member. 15. The structural framing member according to claim 14 wherein a notch has said extension cover being the side edge of a Â½ notch with said web being the back edge of said notch with said web being the opposing side edge of said notch. 16. The structural framing member according to claim 14 wherein said extension with said tongue end for a flat plate to engage said tongue end and said extension to cover said aperture in said structural framing member.
